arts.ttl: The prediction Jimmy Greaves made about Harry Kane at Tottenham in 2015 that was spot on
arts.sum: Before he left Tottenham Hotspur for Bayern Munich in 2023, Harry Kane was able to break the late Jimmy Greaves’ remarkable goalscoring record at the...

arts.ttl: Henderson: Hired a van to watch England at Euros
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson has revealed that he drove to Germany in a van to watch England at last summer's European Championship final after missing out on a call-up.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane release clause, Liverpool transfer interest and stance on Premier League return
arts.sum: Harry Kane has constantly been linked with a return to the Premier League since signing for German giants Bayern Munich and Liverpool are now among the contenders to sign him

arts.ttl: Harry Kane future: Bayern Munich star eyes Alan Shearer record as Premier League return 'becomes a possibility'
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane is reportedly giving serious consideration to returning to the Premier League this summer, with Liverpool a possible destination.

arts.ttl: England's Tuchel holds talks with Foden, Rashford
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has held constructive discussions with Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden after criticising their minimal impact on the wings against Albania.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel fires Jude Bellingham warning over England role
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham will head back to Real Madrid next following a key week away on England duty under new boss Thomas Tuchel. Bellingham completed 90 minutes in a No.10 role in Tuchel’s first game in charge as England cruised to a 2-0 Wembley win over Albania. arts.ttl: Gordon leaves England camp after 'worrying' injury
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has withdrawn from the England squad after sustaining an injury in Friday's 2-0 victory against Albania.

arts.ttl: 'You can't': Declan Rice says what shouldn't happen with Lewis-Skelly because he's playing for England now
'The effort was there' - Tuchel on speaking to Foden & Rashford
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says he has spoken to Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden after Friday's win over Albania.
